what: Rebuild knowledge index to include new entry
why: New entry must be searchable immediately

output.console: Index rebuild result with entry count and duration

success_handling.criteria: Index build flow completes and the new entry appears in the rebuilt index

event.message: Knowledge index rebuilt with new entry included

error_handling.criteria: The knowledge-index-build flow returns an error or does not complete
error_handling.action: Log index build failure as warning, the file exists but may not be searchable until next rebuild

event.message: Index rebuild failed after creating entry {entry_id}

decisions.outcome: Log warning, creation still considered successful — index will rebuild on next trigger
